title: SCP: Lockdown
description: SCP: Lockdown adds a bunch of 'SCP's Derived from the SCP Wiki.
body:
# An Alpha version for 1.20.1 is avaliable!, progress updates will only be on discord!

![Banner for SCP: Lockdown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c705ed1d6af5314c4ba3a415a83d742507adf2a.png)

SCP: Lockdown originally was a remake of the 'SCPCraft' mod created by Yu_tu. Now refreshed in 1.12 (and  1.16.5)! Lockdown's intent is to better reflect SCPs as originally defined in the [SCP-Wiki](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/).

### A note about Alpha 1.16.5 Versions 
Alpha versions (snapshots) are being released on an ad-hoc basis. Alphas do not reflect the final stage of the mod and is subject to be changed as development progresses. For 'Live' Updates, please join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/TzZu6nDVGK)!

#### For versions 1.16.5, you need to use __Java 16__

# It is critical to note that 1.12.2 worlds ARE NOT compatable with the 1.16.5 version of the mod.
This will be the only warning given and any corrupted saves as a result of trying to convert is not SCP: Lockdowns responsibility.

## Mod Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7fRfkqhnRH0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# 

Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to set one up and don't want to bother with it? Just rent an already configured server!
![Bisect Sponsor](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/logos/dark_text@1538x500.png)
Click [here](https://bisecthosting.com/scp), select plan (SCP: Lockdown requires at least 4GB) and use the code scp to get 25% off on any game server and enjoy playing with your friends!

![Second Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a467ed1596bad1a456591bbb3a974a210c74da8.png)

### Meet the Team

### Retired Members

* Reish (the_Wendig0) (Modeller)
* Corvus B and Totemaster for certain sounds.
* Proven Beat (Modeller)
* BlehButAUnicorn (Programmer, Contributions to 1.12.2)
